sections.paragraph:
(“father of strength,” i.e. strong), [Abiel], pr.n. m.-

(1) 1Ch 11:32, see אֲבִי־עַלְבֹון .-(2) the grandfather of king Saul, 1Sa 9:1 14:51 . In the genealogy, as found 1Ch 8:33 9:39 , Net is said to have been Saul’s grandfather, but according to 1Sa 14:1-52:5l, he is rather to be taken as his paternal uncle. The real genealogy stands thus:- Ecc 10:1-20 Act 9:1-43 Eph 6:1-24 Eph 2:1-22 Act 2:1-47 Act 7:1-60
